_note: Internal tracker (NOT rendered on the site). Commission data sourced 2026-05-20, reconciled 2026-05-28 against actual application verdicts. Verify rates inside each dashboard once approved — public pages lag actual terms. The FULLER, current ledger (incl. Tradify/Synchroteam/WorkWave/Skimmer/GorillaDesk applications + the recurring-first apply queue) lives in MEMORY.md and docs/affiliate-audit-2026-05-27.md.

_status_legend.rejected: Rejected by the program (don't retry without traffic data)
_status_legend.not_viable: Wrong program shape for a directory (customer-only / consultant-only) — do NOT apply
_status_legend.re_check: Worth a fresh look — a viable route may exist that an earlier attempt missed
_status_legend.expired: Was approved, link no longer valid

_reconciled_2026_05_28.summary: 3 LIVE, several pending, and 6 confirmed dead (customer-only/rejected). Stop re-applying to the dead ones — that was the wasted-effort risk.
_reconciled_2026_05_28.verified_win_2026_05_28: servicem8 — CONFIRMED via primary source: a SEPARATE PartnerStack AFFILIATE program (not the rejected consultant one) pays 80% of the referred customer's first 12 months, 90-day cookie, open to publishers. Reached via the PartnerStack MARKETPLACE, which is gated by Network membership (see partnerstack_network).
_reconciled_2026_05_28.partnerstack_network: Network application DECLINED 2026-05-28 ('profile not a great fit right now'); re-apply 2026-06-04. Gates the MARKETPLACE (market.partnerstack.com browse-and-join) ONLY — DIRECT vendor PartnerStack links still work (Jobber applied via its direct link = pending, NOT declined). Same root cause as the Google crawl-budget issue: new domain, ~0 traffic. HOLD marketplace-only programs (ServiceM8, Limble) until Jun 4; proceed NOW on direct-link PartnerStack programs (FieldPulse=fieldpulse.partnerstack.com, QuoteIQ, Contractor Foreman) and all non-PartnerStack programs (Contractor+, GoCanvas, Commusoft, PaintScout, etc.).
_reconciled_2026_05_28.strategy: Prioritize RECURRING/lifetime programs over one-time bounties — they compound. Top unjoined recurring targets (see audit doc for URLs): Contractor+ (50% lifetime), QuoteIQ (40% lifetime), GoCanvas (30%, Content-Partner track), FieldPulse (25% lifetime), Commusoft (15% x 2yr), GorillaDesk (20% x 12mo, applied 2026-05-28), Connecteam (+10% ongoing).
_reconciled_2026_05_28.data_corrections: ServiceTitan is a CUSTOMER-referral program (not publisher-tracked) — EV cautious. Service Fusion pays a GIFT CARD, not cash. Jobber's 60% recurring is monthly-plans-only (annual plans pay flat $30-300); PartnerStack route = 90-day cookie. Connecteam = bounty + 10% ongoing, not just 25% year-1.

commission_terms.monthly_recurring_note: 60% recurring applies to MONTHLY plans only; annual plans pay the flat per-tier amounts above

jobber.notes: Applied via PartnerStack 2026-05-24, pending. Broadest applicability across all verticals; highest-volume affiliate for us.

housecall-pro.notes: REJECTED by PartnerStack (and PartnerStack Network) May 2026. Do NOT retry now — reapply only after ~90 days of real organic traffic data. Generous terms ($40-400/sale by plan + 90-day cookie) make it worth a future re-try.

commission_terms.eligibility: Referral must be 3+ techs, 1+ office FTE, in eligible vertical

servicetitan.notes: LIVE link wired. CAVEAT: this is a CUSTOMER-referral program, not a publisher-tracked affiliate — conversions require qualified business referrals (3+ techs), not anonymous directory clicks. The $10k cap is real but treat projected EV cautiously.

commission_terms.referral_offer: 2 months free for referee + $500 gift card for referrer

workiz.notes: LIVE. Partner team (Orit Mendels) replied with 5 qualifying questions on 2026-05-21; answers sent. Link issued: partner.workiz.com/wrenchstack

servicem8.verified_viable: 2026-05-28 — CONFIRMED a real publisher affiliate program, separate from the rejected consultant program
servicem8.network: partnerstack (affiliate) — NOT the direct consultant program

commission_terms.note: 80% of the referred customer's first 12 months of subscription (a one-time payout spread across that year, not perpetual). Open to publishers/content sites — no customer or consultant gating.

servicem8.notes: VERIFIED 2026-05-28 at market.partnerstack.com/page/servicem8. This is a SEPARATE program from the consultant/implementation one rejected 2026-05-24 (that one required $99/yr + a certification course). The PartnerStack affiliate program is open to publishers, pays 80% of the first 12 months, 90-day cookie. GATED: reached via the PartnerStack Marketplace, and the Network was declined until 2026-06-04 — apply after re-applying to the Network on Jun 4 (or via a direct ServiceM8 link if one surfaces). One of the highest one-time payouts in the portfolio (~several hundred to ~$1,000+ per referred customer by plan).

commission_terms.payout_format: GIFT CARD (per official welcome email 2026-05-21), not cash — verify exact terms in dashboard

servicefusion.notes: LIVE link wired. Payout is a gift card, not cash — factor that into revenue forecasts.

commission_terms.note: Hybrid: $200-300 bounty PLUS 10% recurring ongoing (better than the previously-documented '25% year-1')

connecteam.notes: Applied via PartnerStack 2026-05-24, pending. Field-team management; same PartnerStack dashboard as the Jobber application.

fieldedge.notes: Applied 2026-05-24, pending. CAVEAT: rewards appear to be ACCOUNT CREDIT for existing FieldEdge customers, not publisher cash — likely not viable for a directory. Confirm there's a cash publisher track; if not, skip.

buildops.notes: NOT VIABLE — the $500/meeting is a CUSTOMER referral form, not a publisher affiliate program. Do not apply. (A LinkedIn media-partnership ask to Oliver Moorhouse at BuildOps is the alternative path, tracked in MEMORY.)

knowify.notes: NOT VIABLE — customer-only referral program (must be an active Knowify user). Do not apply.

buildertrend.notes: NOT VIABLE — customer-only ('share your love for Buildertrend with fellow builders'); the email submission returned 'You are not eligible to participate.' Do not apply.

_next_actions_in_order: servicem8 (RE-CHECK PartnerStack 80%/12mo affiliate route — possible best-in-portfolio recurring win)
Then work the recurring-first apply queue in docs/affiliate-audit-2026-05-27.md: GorillaDesk (applied 2026-05-28), FieldPulse, QuoteIQ, Contractor+, GoCanvas (Content-Partner), Commusoft
Watch for approvals on the pending applications: jobber, connecteam, fieldedge, tradify, synchroteam, workwave, skimmer, gorilladesk

_total_estimated_ev_per_signup_usd._explanation: Per 10 signups across the portfolio, expect blended EV $5-15k depending on tool mix. NOTE: ServiceTitan's $10k is a customer-referral, not a click-tracked affiliate — discount it in forecasts.
